titleStmt.title: SII 24.247: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 247. (A.R. No. 100 of 1937-38.) SAME WALL.

summary.p: Registers a similar sale of land to the bhaṭṭas of Kōdaṇḍarāma-chaturvēdimaṅgalam by Tiruppāṟkaḍaldāsaṉ alias Tirumalaitandār, a dāsanambi of Tiruvaraṅgam. The record belongs to the fourth regnal year and quotes the details Tulā, śu. 14, Thursday, probably corresponding to A.D. 1317, October 20. The star was Aśvati.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmat cittikkuRead ‘śrīmeykkirttikku’mel komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrīkulaśekhara tevarkku yāṇṭu 4 tu nālāvatu tulā
nāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu caturddaśiyum viyāḻakkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa tināḷ teṉkarai pāṇṭikulapati vaḷanāṭṭu viḷā nāṭṭu tiruvara dāsanampimāril tirumalai tantārāṉa tiruppāṟkaṭal dāsaṉeṉ tiruṉanta vaṉa nilavilai pramāṇam Ittiruppatiyil koyil Akaram śrīkodaṇḍarāmaccatu rvedimaṅkalattu bhaṭṭa
kaḷukku Iṟṟai nāḷāl nāṉ viṟṟukkuṭutta l Eṉṉutāṉa tiruṉantava kkellai kuṭavāyil nalan=tikaḻ nārā ruṉantavaṉamaāy kodaṇḍa[ rāmaccatu rvedima] ṅkalattu bhaṭṭakaḷvilai koṇṭa tiruṉantavaṉattukku meṟkum teṉ pārkkellai maṉṟacca viḷākattu Ellaikku
vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai nalantikaḻ kum Itaṉ teṟku tiruveṅkaṭadāsan tiruṉantavaṉamāy kodaṇḍarāmacca[ turvedimaṅ] kalattu bhaṭṭakaḷ vilaikoṇṭa tirunantavaṉattu vaṭapārkkellai tiru muṭik rumāṉ Eḻuntaruḷukiṟa tiruvitikkut teṟkum Āka Icainta Iṉṉāṉkellaikku naṭuvuṭpaṭṭa tirunantavaṉam mikuti
kkuṟai Uṭpaṭa mal kolaḷavu Ittiru l Eṭṭum Iṅ meṟku Eṉṉutāṉa tiruṉantavaṉattukku Icainta kiḻ pāṟkellai ṭa dāsan tiruṉantavaṉamāy kodaṇḍarāmaccarvedi maṅkalattu bhaṭṭakaḷ vilaikoṇṭa tiruṉantavaṉattukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkkellai maṉṟacca viḷākattu Ellaikku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai kuru
kaikkoṉ dā ṉantavaṉattukku kiḻakku tirumuṭik kuṟaippe ṟkkutteṟkum Uṇa meṟkum kum tiruṉantavaṉam kol 5 Ittirunantavaṉam kol cainta Iṉṉāṉkellaik ṉantavaṉam kol 10 3 Ittirunantavaṉam kol patiṉmuṉṟum nāṉ Ivakaḷukku viṟṟuk kuṭuttuk koḷvatāṉa Emmili
cainta vilaipporuḷ Aṉṟāṭu vaḻaṅkum na ye kāṭṭeṟṟikai vilaipramāṇam paṇṇik kuṭutteṉ ko daṇḍarāmaccaturvedimaṅkalattu bhaṭṭakaḷukku sthaṉeṉ Ippaṭi viṟṟuk kuṭutta Ittiruṉantavaṉattil mel nokkiṉa maramu(m)kiḻ ṉokkiṉa kiṇaṟum bhāgamum
bhāgāśrayaṅkaḷum maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭa samastaprāptikaḷumuḷpaṭa viṟṟuk kuṭutteṉ kodaṇḍarāmaccaturvedimaṅkalattu bhaṭṭakaḷukkut tiruppāṟkaṭal dāsaṉeṉ Ippaṭi viṟṟu kuṭutta Ittiruṉantavaṉam kol patiṉ muṉṟukkum Ippaṇam Irunū poruḷ māvaṟutip poruṭcela volaiyāvatākavum Ituvallatu veṟuporuḷ māvaṟu
tip poruṭcelavolai kāṭṭak kaṭavatallavākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu vilaik kaṟa viṟṟupporuḷaṟak kaikkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilai[pramāṇa]m paṇṇikkuṭutteṉ kodaṇḍarāmaccaturvedimaṅkalattu bhaṭṭakaḷukku Ittirumalai tantārāṉa tiruppāṟ kaṭal tāsaṉeṉ Ippa ntā pāṟkaṭal tāsan Eḻuttu § Ittiruppāṟ kaṭal dāsar makaṉ tirunāvuṭaiyāṉ sam
jñaiyāṉamaikku Ivai vaṅkippuṟattu śrīrāmabhaṭṭan Eḻuttu § Ippaṭikku Ittiruppāṟkaṭal dāsan veṇṭikko m Eḻutiṉamaikku koyilakaram śrī kulaśekharaccaturvedimaṅkalattu muppirāl śaurirājabhaṭṭan Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 24.247 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
